sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - GERHARD von Süpplingenburg (-killed in battle Unstrutt near Homburg 9 Jun 1075).
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - GERHARD von Süpplingenburg, son of BERNHARD von Süpplingenburg Graf im Harzgau & his wife Ida von Querfurt (-killed in battle Unstrutt near Homburg 9 Jun 1075).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg於大約1040年出生在德國時，他的父親Bernhard VON SUPPLINBURG30歲，母親Ida VON QUERFURT29歲。他與Hedwig von Formbach結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1075年6月9日在德國賀林根武斯特盧吉海尼-可萊斯巴德 藍根薩爾札享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg于大约1040年出生在德国时，他的父亲Bernhard VON SUPPLINBURG30岁，母亲Ida VON QUERFURT29岁。他与Hedwig von Formbach结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1075年6月9日在德国賀林根武斯特盧吉海尼-可萊斯巴德 藍根薩爾札享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gerhard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Gebhard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from geb, gib ‘gift’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. St Gebhard was a 10th-century bishop of Constance who founded the abbey of Petershausen.

variants.name: Gebbert
meanings: from geb, gib ‘gift’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. St Gebhard was a 10th-century bishop of Constance who founded the abbey of Petershausen.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Ronald .  It is sometimes used as a given name in its own right.

variants.name: Ronald
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Rögnvaldr (composed of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’). This name was regularly used in the Middle Ages in northern England and Scotland, where Scandinavian influence was strong. It is now widespread throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg was born about 1040, in Germany, his father, Bernhard VON SUPPLINBURG, was 30 and his mother, Ida VON QUERFURT, was 29. He married Hedwig von Formbach. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 9 June 1075, in Bad Langensalza, Unstrut-Hainich-Kreis, Thuringia, Germany, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg est né environ 1040, à Allemagne, son père, Bernhard VON SUPPLINBURG, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Ida VON QUERFURT, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Hedwig von Formbach. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 juin 1075, à Bad Langensalza, Unstrut-Hainich-Kreis, Thüringen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg um 1040 in Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bernhard VON SUPPLINBURG 30 und seine Mutter Ida VON QUERFURT 29. Er hat Hedwig von Formbach geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Juni 1075 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Bad Langensalza, Unstrut-Hainich-Kreis, Thüringen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg è nato il circa 1040 nel Germania, il suo padre, Bernhard VON SUPPLINBURG, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Ida VON QUERFURT, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Hedwig von Formbach. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 giugno 1075, nel Bad Langensalza, Unstrut-Hainich-Kreis, Thüringen, Germania, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburgが約1040年にドイツで生まれた時，父Bernhard VON SUPPLINBURGは30歳，母Ida VON QUERFURTは29歳であった。Hedwig von Formbachと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1075年6月9日にドイツスuリンジェンウンストルト-ヘイニチ-クレイスバド ランジェンサルザで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg(이)가 대략 1040년 독일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bernhard VON SUPPLINBURG(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Ida VON QUERFURT(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Hedwig von Formbach(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1075년 6월 9일 독일 스u링 스트루트-하인이ch-크레이스 바드 랭사자에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg nasceu aproximadamente 1040, em Alemanha, seu pai, Bernhard VON SUPPLINBURG, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Ida VON QUERFURT, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Hedwig von Formbach. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de junho de 1075, em Bad Langensalza, Unstrut-Hainich-Kreis, Thüringen, Alemanha, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg родился около 1040 г. в местности Германия, его отцу по имени Bernhard VON SUPPLINBURG было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Ida VON QUERFURT, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Hedwig von Formbach. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 9 июня 1075 г. в местности бад лангэнсалза, унструт-ханич-крис, тuринген, Германия в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg nació aproximadamente 1040, en Alemania, su papá, Bernhard VON SUPPLINBURG, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Ida VON QUERFURT, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Hedwig von Formbach. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de junio de 1075, en Bad Langensalza, Unstrut-Hainich-Kreis, Thüringen, Alemania, a la edad de 36 años.
